entry.title: The day the Earth became Krypton
entry.summary:
Author: Philis283

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 66,148Chapters: 24/?Kudos: 245

Summary: Based on 'The Kryptonians who invaded Earth' the Kryptonians have run out of Omega's due to an unexplained viruses, so the travel to planets to find a comparable species which happens to be Earth. Where Kal finds his dream Omega called Bruce Wayne.

entry.title: Slower Mornings
entry.summary:
Author: nevaehluvspandas

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 732Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 35

Summary: The elevator is packed, but Bruce Wayne doesn’t care. He keeps one hand on Clark’s tie and the other on his bag strap, wearing the same bored expression he uses in board meetings—while deliberately rubbing his thigh against Clark’s painfully hard cock for the entire ride.By the time they reach Bruce’s office, Clark is shaking.What happens next is fast, messy, and filthy: Clark bending Bruce over the mahogany desk and fucking him hard while Bruce continues to tease him with that infuriatingly calm voice, even as he’s getting railed and filled with cum.“Faster, Kent. I’ve had slower mornings.”

entry.title: And I'll Do It Over Again (Hopefully Better This Time)
entry.summary:
Author: god_i_love_fanfics

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,485Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 367

Summary: If you told one Damian Wayne he’d find a small, pit-touched child shivering under an overpass in a pool of what appeared to be Lazarus water tainted only by rainwater and blood, he’d probably question your sanity. Of course, he’d keep what you’d said in mind, but ultimately regard the notion as the nonsensical babbling of an unstable fool. After all, people, especially children, don’t just bleed Pit waters. But that’s exactly what he’s looking at, isn’t it?

entry.title: Who the hell is Nightwing?
entry.summary:
Author: acebagle

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,524Chapters: 6/8Kudos: 329

Summary: "I would like to propose Nightwing. He is an-" "No." Batman interjected. "Batman, if you would allow me to finish my nomination then we may move on to the discussion." Diana said. "No. Nightwing will not be joining the Justice League." Batman stated, with a rigidity to his shoulders that Hal had rarely seen outside of a crisis. --- When Nightwing joins the Justice League Hal Jordan doesn't know what to make of him. Despite his easy-going personality Hal can sense deeper troubles underneath the surface and with his identity as secretive as Batman's its hard to get a clear picture. He seems to know far too much about their local Bat and is far to intimate to be 'just friends' with Roy. Or seven times Hal Jordan is confused about Nightwing's relationship with his fellow League members and one time that he understands.

entry.title: Never too Late
entry.summary:
Author: wutian010701

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,858Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 10

Summary: When the surprise hits, Superman feels like he's been handed the greatest gift on Earth, and Batwoman starts having nightmares. A theory about if the Injustice:God among us begins with Superman loses Batwoman - as in the love of his life & his pregnant wife. *Though the official Earth-11 gender-swap canon uses the name Bryce, it just feels too distant for readers to connect with Bruce... so I'm using Brucia.*

entry.title: For Once In My Life
entry.summary:
Author: bobeepop

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,047Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 117

Summary: And Bruce laughed, actually laughed. He thought for a moment that he was either dreaming and this whole day has been too good to be true or that he had unfortunately passed away and is now in heaven. “It's mine actually.” Holding out a light blue mug with “The Daily Planet” in bright red lettering– wait he knows this cup, it's the cup that he thought he lost when he moved apartments a few years ago. Feeling a swirl of emotions, he’s unsure how he’s supposed to respond. Choking on his own spit, Clark stammers out, “I-Is that mine?” “What? No, Jason got it for me about 2 years ago for Father’s Day.” Bruce says, amused and a little confused, with an incredulous expression displayed on his face. He really was going crazy. Why would Batman take his cup and then lie about it? Or Bruce figures out that he might like Clark, while the man in question has spent the last 4 years pining after him.

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 75,940Chapters: 15/30Kudos: 432

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

entry.title: But you can't take the circus from the boy
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,000Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 291

Summary: Damian Wayne has everything he's ever wanted. A beautiful husband. A precious child. A title of his own. Even his siblings, having experienced horrors beyond their years, are growing as people alongside him. But with everything in his life moving so smoothly, he can't help but wonder when the other shoe will drop. Happiness isn't something that comes easily to Demons, after all.

  • Kryptonian Biology (DCU)
  • Wholesome
  • Good Parent Jonathan Samuel Kent
  • Sibling Bonding
  • Minor Injuries

entry.title: Bats Are Social Creatures
entry.summary:
Author: ope-uh-oh (shortjacketlongskirt)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,119Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 1,275

Summary: Batman never makes time to socialize, so it’s been hard for the team to get to know him, and even harder to guess his secret identity. Clark is hopeful when Batman finally agrees to join them on an after-hours outing.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

  • Dick Grayson & Clark Kent & Bruce Wayne
  • Justice League & Clark Kent & Bruce Wayne

  • Oliver Queen
  • Justice League Doesn't Know Bruce Wayne is Batman

  • Bruce Wayne is Bad at Feelings

  • Clark Kent is a Ray of Sunshine
